sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions after UP x2
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

for color_name, color_char in [('Player', 'M'), ('Green', 'N'), ('Red', 'R'), ('Blue', 'b')]:
    rows = [r for r, line in enumerate(ascii_lines) if color_char in line and r < 50]
    if rows:
        cols = set()
        for r in rows:
            for c, ch in enumerate(ascii_lines[r]):
                if ch == color_char:
                    cols.add(c)
        print(f"{color_name}: rows [{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check the area around the player
print("\n=== Around player ===")
for r in range(10, 30):
    line = ascii_lines[r][8:52]
    if any(c in line for c in 'MNbRgWw'):
        print(f"  Row {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
